text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking in front of the station...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Like I just said, the glass was already broken when
we arrived!

text_block_list.name: Elderly Bookstore Owner
text_block_list.text:
Quit your lying mouth! I've heard enough from
you!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! You stubborn old man! Why don't you
wanna believe us?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh... But seriously, it wasn't us who broke the window.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Bookstore Owner
text_block_list.text:
Huh, won't bother to show any remorse, will you?
You're as disrespectful as you look! Young people
these days...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hold up. Can you, like, not make snap judgments based on how we look?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That one ticked Gold City off. Things can only
get worse from here!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Trainer?! What are you doing here?
choice_data_list: Looked like you were in a pickle.
Looked like you were in a pickle.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's not like we needed you to swoop in and save
us...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Talk about lucky! I will happily let you take over here. ☆

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, get real. Times like these, you just gotta
let the grown-ups talk it out.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Bookstore Owner
text_block_list.text:
Oh... So you are the guardian of these children?
How are you going to pay for my broken window?
choice_data_list: I apologize for all the trouble.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? What are you apologizing for?!
choice_data_list:
I'm prepared to take responsibility, but let me
check something first.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Bookstore Owner
text_block_list.text: Check? Check what?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After waiting for the owner to calm down, we
look around the area and ask a few bystanders
some questions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fortunately, someone at a nearby coffee shop
witnessed the moment the incident happened.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Bookstore Owner
text_block_list.text: So it was those local brats who broke the window!

text_block_list.name: Elderly Bookstore Owner
text_block_list.text:
I'm terribly sorry for all the trouble. Thank you for
your help sorting this out.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list: I'm just glad we found the real culprits.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Bookstore Owner
text_block_list.text:
I should apologize to you two as well. It was
childish of me to get so worked up—I wasn't
listening properly to what you said.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Bookstore Owner
text_block_list.text:
I convinced myself you were lying. I should have
done better... I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You're good! See, City? I knew it was the right
call to let your trainer take over! ☆

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It's not fair...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's not fair you can just stroll in saying "guardian"
this and "responsibility" that, and then the whole
thing is just fixed.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But you did help us out, so...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sorry about earlier. I'm glad you were there.
choice_data_list: Is that a sign of respect?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You're such an adult.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the rest of the day, Gold City seems to look
at me a little differently from usual.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...I really want to tell you to shut it, but I'll fight
the urge, just for today.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'll swing by your office later with some snacks or
whatever. Not trying to owe you anything.
choice_data_list:
Will you bring me something sweet like my
personality?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ew... You're so done.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I probably shouldn't have said that last part...
